---
title: "Lab 2 ‚Äî USV PID Tuning"
subtitle: "Week 7 ¬∑ {{< var quarter >}}"
---

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
**Status:** in-progress page. Material added and revised through the week.
:::

## Overview

_TBD ‚Äî one paragraph: what the lab is, what students will produce, and how it ties to the closed-loop control material covered in lecture._

## Learning Objectives

By the end of Lab 2, you should be able to:

- _TBD_
- _TBD_
- _TBD_

## Background

### Closed-loop control architecture

_TBD ‚Äî embed or link the Speed + Yaw-Rate controller architecture diagram (`book/w07_lab_usv_pid/chapter/usv_control_architecture.drawio`)._

### Key signals and parameters

_TBD ‚Äî short table: ArduPilot parameter names you will tune (ATC_SPEED_*, ATC_STR_RAT_*) and the log channels you will look at (THR, STER, GPS, RCOU, PIDS, PIDT)._

## Vehicle Setup

### Preset parameters

_TBD ‚Äî link to the baseline `.param` file and call out the preset values that should not be changed (ATC_ACCEL_MAX = 0, ATC_STR_ACC_MAX = 0, ATC_STR_RAT_FF = 0, CRUISE_THROTTLE = 0)._

### Tunable parameters

_TBD ‚Äî list the parameters students will adjust during the lab._

## Pre-Lab Preparation

- _TBD_
- _TBD_

## In-Lab Procedure

### Speed step responses

_TBD ‚Äî sequence of steps the student team performs at the boat ramp._

### Yaw-rate step responses

_TBD_

### Logging

_TBD ‚Äî confirm logging is active, note arming/disarming behavior (`LOG_FILE_DSRMROT`)._

## Data Analysis

After the field session, process the logs locally:

1. **Convert `.BIN` ‚Üí `.mat`** using [`utils/ardu_utils/bin2mat.py`](https://github.com/bsb808/introduction-to-feedback-control/blob/main/utils/ardu_utils/bin2mat.py).
2. **Inspect timeseries** with [`book/w07_lab_usv_pid/code/proc_closedloop_response.m`](https://github.com/bsb808/introduction-to-feedback-control/blob/main/book/w07_lab_usv_pid/code/proc_closedloop_response.m).
3. **Compute step metrics** with [`book/w07_lab_usv_pid/code/closedloop_stepinfo.m`](https://github.com/bsb808/introduction-to-feedback-control/blob/main/book/w07_lab_usv_pid/code/closedloop_stepinfo.m) ‚Äî rise time, settling time, overshoot, steady-state error.

## Deliverables

_TBD ‚Äî what each team submits and where._

## References

- _Lab chapter PDF (build pending) ‚Äî `book/w07_lab_usv_pid/chapter/lab_usv_pid.pdf`_
- ArduPilot Rover documentation ‚Äî see `book/w07_lab_usv_pid/refs/ardupilot_references.md` for curated links

## Notes & Updates

_Live notes during the week ‚Äî questions raised in lab, parameter values that worked, gotchas, etc._
